g.text: Raw continuous Fare (synthetic, n=1500) with multiple class-fare spikes (0, 7.25, 13, 26.55)
ContinuousDiscretizer flags values occurring ≥ 1/q (0.07) as their own singleton bin — all
8 CD bins: 4 thin spike singletons + quantile bins. Those with Wilson upper bound below
OrdinalDiscretizer merges each rare bin into its dominant neighbour — arrows point from the
sparse bin to the bin that absorbs it.
6 bins after CD + OD. Each merged bar spans its absorbed Stage-2 slots and keeps the dominant
